concept_summary: A tiny example concept used as a cross-schema fixture. The player reads a target number and taps counter tiles to accumulate a running total; when the running total equals the target, the player commits. Happy-path illustration of additive composition toward a visible target within 10.
constraints: running total must be visible at all times

core_mechanic.feedback_loop: The running total is always visible. On a matching commit the target flashes green; on overshoot the running total resets with an amber cue.
core_mechanic.player_action: Tap counter tiles to add their value to a running total, then commit when the running total equals the target.

misconception_targets.description: Player clicks as fast as possible and ignores the running total, assuming any click is progress regardless of the target.

success_condition: Player stops tapping when the running total equals the target, not before and not after.

target_skill.description: Additive composition toward a stated target within 10, demonstrated through deliberate tap-to-accumulate gameplay.

title: Example Game
